title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!
